title: Fragment: Thoughts Come And Go In Solitude.
content:
My thoughts arise and fade in solitude,
    The verse that would invest them melts away
    Like moonlight in the heaven of spreading day:
    How beautiful they were, how firm they stood,
    Flecking the starry sky like woven pearl!
meaning:
"Fragment: Thoughts Come And Go In Solitude." is a quintessential example of Percy Bysshe Shelley's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
